Entry.JapaneseText: <Rondoline>
Entry.EnglishText: <Rondoline>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Mel>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mel>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Suzu>
Entry.EnglishText: <Suzu>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Arche>
Entry.EnglishText: <Arche>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Mint>
Entry.EnglishText: <Mint>

Entry.JapaneseText: アルベルト
Entry.EnglishText: Albert

Entry.JapaneseText: Variable
Entry.EnglishText: Variable

Entry.JapaneseText: あー、サッパリしたぁ
Entry.EnglishText: Ahh...That hit the spot...

Entry.JapaneseText: 肌がツルツルになったみたい
Entry.EnglishText: Whoa your skin is so smooth!

Entry.JapaneseText: それは温泉の効能ですね。 他にも腰痛や肩こり、擦り傷などにも効きます
Entry.EnglishText: No doubt thanks to the hot spring. It's also effective against back pains, stiff muscles, and scratches.

Entry.JapaneseText: 胸が大きくなる効能はないの〜？ <Mint>と<Rody>だけズルイじゃん！
Entry.EnglishText: Reckon it can also make your boobs bigger? It's kind of unfair that <Mint> and <Rody>'s are large!

Entry.JapaneseText: わ、私はこれ以上大きくなっても……
Entry.EnglishText: E-Even if my breasts grow bigger...

Entry.JapaneseText: だよねぇ、<Mint>は<Cless>だけが 喜んでくれれば、それでいいんだもんね∀
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah. It's all right as long as <Cless> is happy, am I right, <Mint>?

Entry.JapaneseText: ………あぁ………あぁぁ…… あーーーーーー！！！ ズルイだぁ！！！
Entry.EnglishText: A-Ahh....Ughh...This... This is unfair!!

Entry.JapaneseText: ど、どうしたんですか、アルベルトさん！？
Entry.EnglishText: What's wrong, Albert!?

Entry.JapaneseText: ……おらも、おらも……温泉入りてぇだーよ！
Entry.EnglishText: I...I want to get in the hot springs too!

Entry.JapaneseText: 入りたいって言っても、あんたタンスじゃん。 中の服がビショビショになっちゃうじゃんよ
Entry.EnglishText: Say that all you want, you're still a wardrobe. You'll end up soaking all the clothes inside if you take a swim!

Entry.JapaneseText: だって、ズルイだ！ さっきから話聞いてっと、 誰もが夢見る桃源郷が、すぐそこにあるだーよ！
Entry.EnglishText: That's why it's unfair! I've been listening in to you girls talking and it all sounds like a dream! A Shangri-La on earth!

Entry.JapaneseText: これが悔しくなくて、何が悔しいだか！！ うぅ……、うぅぅぅ…………
Entry.EnglishText: This aches my heart so deeply, on a visceral level! Uhuhuhuhuh...!

Entry.JapaneseText: 君、どっちにしろ女湯には入れないから
Entry.EnglishText: Y'know what, even if you weren't a wardrobe, you'll never be let into the ladies' bath either way.
